pattern: Iterate over consecutive pairs in the input treating the first as a repeat count and the second as a value, appending the value that many times to the result.
hints: The input is always an even-length list of (frequency, value) pairs — step through it two elements at a time.
For each pair, extend the output list with the value repeated frequency times.
A single list comprehension or a loop with extend handles this in one pass with no extra state.

edge_inputs.description: two pairs, first has frequency 1 and second has frequency 3
maximum frequency and maximum value in both pairs
frequency 1 followed by a larger frequency — output is not symmetric

stress.description: random even-length list of up to 50 pairs with values 1-100
